sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: The white dot moved to the diamond now. So SPACE cycles between shapes. Let me check the current state.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']

white_dot = None
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'W' and n['pixels'] == 1:
        white_dot = tuple(n['boundary'][0])
print(f"White dot: {white_dot}")

# Check R shapes
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'R' and n['pixels'] > 10:
        center_row = sum(p[0] for p in n['boundary']) / len(n['boundary'])
        center_col = sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary']) / len(n['boundary'])
        print(f"R shape: pixels={n['pixels']}, center≈({center_row:.0f}, {center_col:.0f})")

# Check targets
targets = []
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'c' and n['pixels'] == 8:
        for cid in n['children']:
            child = next((c for c in seg if c['id'] == cid), None)
            if child:
                targets.append(tuple(child['boundary'][0]))
print(f"Targets remaining: {len(targets)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
